message:
fix(trace): use total order for supervision log entries with equal virtual time

CrashPackBuilder::build() previously sorted the supervision log by
virtual_time alone.  When multiple entries share the same virtual
time (common in practice during concurrent supervision decisions),
the sort was unstable and serialization depended on insertion order.

Replace sort_by_key(|s| s.virtual_time) with a 5-field total order:
virtual_time → task → region → decision → context.  This guarantees
deterministic CrashPack serialization regardless of the order in
which supervision snapshots are added to the builder.

Adds test supervision_log_equal_vt_has_deterministic_total_order
that inserts three snapshots with identical virtual_time in two
different orders and verifies both produce the same sorted sequence.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
